description: In May of 2018, I left my career as an English teacher to pursue my passion of interior decorating. I opened a booth at a local antique and consignment store where I sell DIY crafts, and thrifted, up-cycled, and vintage home decor. Turning thrift store finds into beautiful and useful home decor gives me such joy. My own home has always been a work in progress as I experiment with new trends and classic designs testing my skills as I paint, reupholster, knock down walls, wallpaper, build furniture, and much more. It is my hope that this channel will inspire and instruct others to create a beautiful home on a budget. For more budget friendly decorating inspiration check out my Canterbury Cottage Facebook, Pinterest, and Instagram accounts.
